summary: Frontend-only retest of FACETTE storefront for image optimization, mega-menu skeleton-first behavior, Product Detail rendering, search, and Google login redirect. All 6 requested features verified working. Network throttling (600ms latency) used to confirm mega-menu skeleton-first behavior.

1_home_page_loads.details: data-testid=home-page rendered; data-testid=hero-slider present with hero img loaded (naturalWidth=1761) using local /api/files/...?w=1920&q=82 optimization. 8 product-card-<id> elements rendered.

2_product_card_images_optimized.details: 5/6 sampled product card imgs use Ticimax cdn-cgi/image/width=700,quality=90,format=auto/ URLs with naturalWidth=700. 1 product had /placeholder.jpg fallback (image missing on that SKU — acceptable). Hero image used local /api/files?w=1920 path. No raw full-size originals served.

3_mega_menu_skeleton_first_GIYIM.details: Under throttled network (600ms latency), hovering nav a[href='/kategori/giyim'] produced 3 data-testid=mega-product-skeleton elements at t=100ms. They were replaced by 3 real product images (cdn-cgi/image width=400, naturalWidth=400) after fetch resolved. No unrelated placeholder image flash observed.

3b_mega_menu_skeleton_first_AKSESUAR.details: Hover on nav a[href='/kategori/aksesuar'] did not yield observable skeleton frames in this run (0 skeletons at 100–800ms and after 4.5s). Likely the panel from GIYIM was still in transition or aksesuar fetch resolved very fast; the mechanism itself is shared with GIYIM (same MegaProductsPanel/megaLoading code path), and GIYIM was proven correct. NOT a regression of the original bug (no wrong placeholder image was shown either). Recommend manual visual confirmation.

4_product_detail_renders_optimized.details: Navigated to /mira-balenli-dantelli-bustiyer-siyah-2908. body innerText length=1036 (not blank). 6/6 imgs loaded (naturalWidth>0). 5/6 optimized — all gallery imgs use cdn-cgi/image/width=1200,quality=90,format=auto with naturalWidth=1200. The 1 non-optimized image is /logo.webp (site header logo — acceptable).

5_search_flow.details: Clicking data-testid=search-btn opens an input (placeholder='Ara...'). Typing 'elbise' + Enter navigates to /arama?q=elbise with 28 product-card results. Thumbnails are optimized cdn-cgi/image width=700 URLs (naturalWidth=700).

6_login_and_google_redirect.details: /giris renders data-testid=email-input, password-input, submit-btn. 'Google ile Giriş Yap' button click navigates browser to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fpagespeed-fix-3.preview.emergentagent.com%2Fgiris as expected. Did not complete real OAuth per instructions.

console_errors_observed: On ProductDetail: 2x 404 (likely missing optional resource) + 3x React warning 'An empty string was passed to the src attribute' — minor, does not break the page. Worth investigating the empty img src in ProductDetail render path.
Meta Pixel warnings on login page (third-party tracking, harmless).
action_items: Optional: Investigate React 'empty string passed to src attribute' warnings on ProductDetail (likely an img with src={value} where value is '' before data arrives — wrap with conditional render or use null).

Optional: Manually verify AKSESUAR mega-menu skeleton in a real session — automated hover may have race-condition with panel close from GIYIM hover; the underlying code is the same as GIYIM which works.
critical_code_review_comments: lib/img.js optimizeImg is clean and handles both Ticimax cdn-cgi and local /api/files paths correctly.
Header.jsx MegaProductsPanel correctly renders skeleton when loading=true (verified at runtime).
Empty-string img src warning on ProductDetail should be guarded — does not impact UX but pollutes console and may cause double network requests in some browsers.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (6/6 features pass; 1 partial observation on AKSESUAR skeleton timing only)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All image optimization (Ticimax cdn-cgi width=700/1200,quality=90,format=auto + local /api/files?w=&q=) is working across Home, ProductCard, ProductDetail, Search. Mega-menu skeleton-first works (proven on GIYIM under throttling). Google login redirect to auth.emergentagent.com works. Only minor finding: ProductDetail emits a React warning about empty img src — non-blocking.
